locations.name: 阿普里馬克河
locations.summary: 阿普里馬克河（西班牙語：Río Apurímac）是全球最大河流系統亞馬遜河的源頭，發源至距離太平洋海岸160公里的秘魯西南部高5,597米的密斯米雪山，向西北流經庫斯科，阿普里馬克河在730.04公里的地方（12°15′46″S 73°…

locations.name: 灌木林
locations.summary: 灌木林与矮树林是一类特殊生物群系，其密度较灌丛高，高度较疏林矮。由于产生条件苛刻，灌木林只成片分布于两类地区。木干较灌木粗壮的可称为矮树林。 高山常绿阔叶云林 这种常绿阔叶亚型主要分布于菲律宾、苏门答腊等岛屿及中南美洲的安第斯山，常常位于…

relations.subject: Ayacucho thistletail
relations.evidence: The Ayacucho thistletail is found in the northern part of Peru's Department of Ayacucho west of the Apurímac River

relations.subject: Ayacucho thistletail
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits elfin forest and Polylepis woodlands in the tree line ecotone

relations.subject: Ayacucho thistletail
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. Its total range is "perhaps just 500 km2 [190 mi2], within which elfin forest habitats are fragmented and degraded by anthropogenic disturbance."
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
